answers: I did not struggle long or hard enough to be worthy of being in this answer, but this week's experiences taught me that different languages are similar and different in many ways.
Learning the functions, learning syntax, and defining things
Understanding the code is the first and most important step to coding.
In this codex, I learned that I should indent the lines in a function after it is defined to keep the code organized, and to keep from receiving an error from Python.
I did not really struggle with anything.
I didn't have a question so I used yours
I'm surprised at how quickly it is to respond and still give proper answers.
